title: Simple F3 master
body:
### Simpe F3 master is your all-in-one Minecraft monitoring companion!
[![https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HiWord9/RPRenames/extra/links/github.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HiWord9/RPRenames/extra/links/github.png)](https://github.com/StefanNeckrasov)
[![https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HiWord9/RPRenames/extra/links/thx4donation.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HiWord9/RPRenames/extra/links/thx4donation.png)](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/stefan_bro)

This mod doesn't just show game stats; it's customizable to present important information exactly the way you like it. such as FPS, coordinates, creatures, etc.
All information can be turned on or off, for example, if you don't need to know the fps, you just turn off information about it

![Information considering entities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc92edac1b8c9c98a653d4ad5ea5e3cc3c534553.png)
![Information without regard to entities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/024d40c20161bcead09ba868b0c4c458a0d969f5.png)
